case_title: EVIN TEO FLORIAN VS. DEAN ALAC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLORIAN, EVIN TEO AS TO DEFENDANT ALAC, DEAN AN INDIVIDUAL DBA DEAN ALAC CONSTRUCTION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLORIAN, EVIN TEO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALAC, DEAN AN INDIVIDUAL DBA DEAN ALAC CONSTRUCTION $4,835.07 PRINCIPAL, $68.88 INTEREST, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,103.95, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
